description_long: This house features a rectangular main structure with a red gable roof and a smaller attached section with a matching roof. The exterior walls are primarily white, with a yellow accent on the smaller section, and the windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows. The property sits on a stylized plot with geometric green and brown landscaping, including terraced steps and patterned lawns. The main entrance is sheltered by an overhanging roof supported by columns, and there is a covered porch area. The rooflines are simple and traditional, with the main roof running parallel to the longer axis of the house. The overall design suggests a blend of Mediterranean and Ranch architectural influences, with a focus on functional, open outdoor spaces.
description: A white and yellow house with red gable roofs, symmetrical windows, and a covered porch, set on a geometric landscaped plot. The design blends Mediterranean and Ranch styles with terraced lawns and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main white facade, symmetrical windows, and the covered porch with columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow section, the intersecting gable roofs, and the terraced landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white wall, roof overhang, and the geometric lawn patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the yellow section, the gable roof ends, and more terraced steps.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, overhanging roof, and a central main door
